mapper.update: update admin_users set password = #{password}, department = #{department}, admin_pw = #{admin_pw}, name = #{name}, admin_role = #{admin_role} where admin_id = #{admin_id}

update users set password = #{password}, name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, birth = #{birth}, email = #{email}, gender = #{gender}, e_name = #{e_name}, postal_code = #{postal_code}, address = #{address}, address_detail = #{address_detail} where user_id = #{user_id}

update company_users set password = #{password}, name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, birth = #{birth}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, gender = #{gender}, e_name = #{e_name} where company_user_id = #{company_user_id}
